full_text:
Big omental tumor with some fibrotic tissue.

Tumor was minced in 40 ml of AdF++ with dispase and DNAse according to the protocol.

RBC lysis was done using 4ml of the buffer.

Final pellet was resuspended in 5 ml of the culture medium

Cell count 1):

total: 12.7 E6

live: 9.42 E6

viability: 74.5 %

size: 8.6 um

Cell count 2):

total: 10.2 E6

live: 8 E6

viability: 78.5 %

size: 8.2 um

Total cell count: 11.5 e6 cells / mL

Total volume: 57.5 E6 cells

A). Drug treatment for flow cytometry (48 well plate)

13 conditions, 6 replicates per condition = 78 wells

78 wells x 40 µl x = 3120 µl → round up to 3400 uL (=1133ul x3)

1000 cells/µl = 1.13 E6 * 3 tubes

→ make 3 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1133 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

ORG full medium + cells=

ome-gel → 160 µl

aprotinin → 3.8 µl

thrombin → 3.4 µl

fibrinogen → 22.6 µl

Add Fibrinogen to the first tube, mix well. Pipette 40uL per well as a droplet at the center of the well.

Try to be quick as the mixture solidifies once you add Fibrinogen. After the first tube, continue with second and then third tube.

→ Let the droplet solidify for 60 min in cell culture incubator - add 300 uL medium + 50 ul of diluted drugs per well next day

B) Drug treatment for IF:

13 conditions, 4 replicates per condition = 52 wells, make it 55 wells

55 wells x 6 µl x = 330 µl → round up to 400 uL

1000 cells/µl = 0.3 E6

One of the vials which contains cells that we prepared for 48 well plate was used here

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 150 uL medium + 25 ul of diluted drugs per well next day

NOTE: The plating of 96 wells was challenging, some drips had moved to the sides or the last wells had fewer cells due to omentum gel solidification. Next time prepare smaller batches for 96 wells

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 1.12 E6 cells* 2 tubes for ab stain and disdain control, per 900 uL flow staining buffer

E) Sample for cryo

→ Freeze 7.6 e6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker (x 3 vials)

Drug treatment was done on day 0, approximately 1.5h after plating the cells as indicated below

For ATXi and ATRi single and combination treatment for flowcytometry analysis

x on 48 well plate = 6 x 50 uL = 300 uL

x on 96 well plate = 8 x 25 uL = 200 uL

(!) c1v1 = c2v2 -> c1 x 10 uL = c2 x v2

IC50 of ATRi (Berzosertib (VE-822) is 19 nM on cell lines (https://www.selleckchem.com/products/ve-822.html)

Stock concentration of ATRi is 10mM, dilute to 0.1 mM in DMSO and use it for further dilutions indicated in this table

IC50 of ATXi Ziritaxestat (GLPG1690) is 130 nM on cell lines (https://www.medchemexpress.com/GLPG1690.html)

Stock concentration of ATXi is 1mM, dilute to 0.1 mM in DMSO and use it for further dilutions indicated in this table

The drugs were administered on the same day and the cultures were grown for 3 days before harvesting for flow cytometry.

Plate Map:-

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
